hook.summary: Two anime-style heroines face a massive zombie blockade on a bridge.
hook.visual_action: A girl on a pink weaponized motorcycle and a girl with a katana prepare to charge through a horde of zombies.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Looks like a dead end. Just a traffic jam. Clear it.

scene_flow: Characters confront a zombie blockade on a bridge and decide to push through.
The katana-wielding girl leaps off the bike to slice through zombies in mid-air.
The motorcycle speeds up, using a truck as a ramp to fly over a massive explosion.
The duo lands safely and drives away as the game title and slogan appear.
audience_proxy: Male fans of anime-style action games and zombie survival themes who enjoy high-octane cinematic sequences.
